headline: I’m 72: Here’s the Exact Script I Used To Cut My Cellphone Bill by $312 Annually
summary: Robert T., 72, cut his cellphone bill by $26/month ($312/year) using this exact negotiation script. Here's what he said to Verizon.

headline: Four High-Yield Stocks That Could Fund Your $60,000 Annual Retirement Income
summary: Four tickers. One goal: $60,000 a year in income without touching a paycheck. The question is how much capital it takes to get there, and what you give up depending on how hard you push your portfolio to work. Why the 10-Year Treasury Changes Everything Before looking at any dividend stock, consider the baseline. The ... Four High-Yield Stocks That Could Fund Your $60,000 Annual Retirement Income
